title: AdvancedBackpack
description: My backpack plugin hooks with Shulker Box Tooltip for absolute perfection! Take your item storage to the next level!
body:
# **🎒 AdvancedBackpack (with Tooltip-Extra🔍)**

My nearly perfect Backpack-Plugin <3
- 🔍 hooks with Shulker Box Tooltip for perfection!
- 🗡️ supports all custom items (extra long nbt)
- 🎒 adds 28 Backpacks accessable via command /bp or in the following updates via my client mod for keybind
- 📦 storage is currently set to YAML for now, but we can easily migrate your data to MySQL in one of the upcoming update
- 🔁 switch feature for switching between the backpacks without closing
- 📄 Fully Folia-compatible from 1.21.11 (realtime updates will follow)
- 📄 Fully Paper-compatible from 1.20.4 (realtime updates will follow)
- 🧵 Region-thread safe
- 🧠 Async-safe inventories


This plugin adds a backpack with 28 Slots 4x7 Backspacks.
The special thing here is, my plugin connects with the Clientside Mod: Shulker Box Toolttip. 

As storage for now its yml, but i will change this in the upcoming update, so you can choose yourself between yml, mysql and h2 :)

Switch feature:
If you’re in an backpack and want to switch to another but don’t actually want to close it, I’ve added a small quality-of-life tweak — when you close a backpack, it automatically reopens the backpack main menu so you can easily switch back to other ones ✅

Features in work:
- Share backpackslots with friends
- Client Side Mod for Keybind Opening (80% ready)
- Choose between yml, mysql and h2 storage
- Paper support (already done for 1.20.4 - 1.21.11 but without the switch feature 🔁)


Link to ShulkerBoxTooltip:
https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip

# **Showcase**
